title: ga`ash #1607
definition:
1) to shake, quake
    1a) (Qal) to shake
    1b) (Pual) to be shaken up, convulsed
    1c) (Hithpael) to shake back and forth, toss or reel to and fro
    1d) (Hithpoel) to reel to and fro
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to shake, quake
    1a) (Qal) to shake
    1b) (Pual) to be shaken up, convulsed
    1c) (Hithpael) to shake back and forth, toss or reel to and fro
    1d) (Hithpoel) to reel to and fro

    NASB:  to shake, quake
